required_columns.name: concentration
required_columns.meaning: known or prepared analyte concentration for calibration standards

required_columns.name: absorbance
required_columns.meaning: blank-corrected absorbance reading unless declared otherwise

measurement_model.noise_model: independent Gaussian absorbance noise or declared replicate model

admission_checks: concentration column is finite and nonnegative under declared unit
absorbance uncertainty or replicate convention is declared
data are inside the declared linear/calibrated range
residual adequacy gate is recorded if a calibration slope is fitted
allowed_output: local concentration precision or calibration Fisher precision
mandatory_refusals: division by undeclared or nonpositive denominator
